subcodes.first_line: How can I make mention of Thee, O my God, when I behold all else as nothingness before the manifestations of Thy sovereignty and as utterly devoid [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کیف اذکرک یا الهی بعد الذی اری ما سواک معدوما عند ظهورات سلطنتک و کلیلا عند
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for protection, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
